extension.summary: MP3 Streams Echoed — music streaming for Kodi
extension.description: Browse and stream songs and albums. Browse by genre, search artists, albums or songs, save favourites, play or shuffle full albums, and stream tracks directly in Kodi.

extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 3, 29 June 2007

extension.summary: Put all your favourites bits of all your favourites addons into one easy to use addon.
Ponga todas sus partes favoritas de todos sus complementos favoritos en un complemento fácil de usar.
extension.description: Super Favourites is a better way of managing your Kodi Favourites.[CR][CR]Virtually any menu item within Kodi can be added to Super Favourites, even from addons that don't normally provide this feature.[CR][CR]Super Favourites allows you to better manage your Kodi favourites, including the creation of sub-folders, into which your Kodi favourites can then be copied or moved into.[CR][CR]This allows you to create you own custom addon with just the best bits of your favourite addons. Search your favourite addons, play your favourite music, read your favourite comic strips, select your favourite playlists, browse your favourite movies, listen to your favourite radio stations, watch your favourite cartoons, the possibilities are endless, all from within one easy to use addon.

Super Favoritos es la mejor forma de administrar sus favoritos de Kodi.[CR][CR]Prácticamente cualquier elemento de menú dentro de Kodi se puede agregar a Súper favoritos, incluso desde complementos que normalmente no brindan esta función.[CR][CR]Super Favoritos le permite administrar mejor sus favoritos de Kodi, incluída la creación de subcarpetas, en las que puede copiar o mover sus secciones o addons preferidos.[CR][CR]Esto le permite crear su propio complemento personalizado con lo mejor. Busque sus addons preferidos, reproduzca su música favorita, lea sus historias favoritas, seleccione sus listas de reproducción, explore sus películas, escuche sus estaciones de radio, vea sus dibujos animados, las posibilidades son infinitas, todos sus favoritos desde un solo uso addon, fácil de añadir.
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 2, June 1991
extension.news:
2.4.1 March 2026 - Fixed Unknown Video Info Key "label" error logged on every list item render - Replaced eval() with ast.literal_eval() for castandrole deserialization - Removed redundant setProperty('Fanart_Image') - fanart already set via setArt() - Fixed invalid regex escape sequences in default.py, favourite.py, utils.py (bare string escapes \w \( \) \[ \$ \s now correctly raw strings) - Removed dead yt.py YouTube trailer resolver and _PLAYTRAILER handler
2.4.0 March 2026 - Python 3 / Kodi 19+ compatibility fixes throughout - Fixed silent crash in getKodiSetting() caused by Python 2 dict.has_key() calls - Fixed random "FLLY FORMED" debug dialog appearing during context menu use - Fixed inverted download confirmation dialog (Confirm/Cancel buttons were swapped) - Fixed unbounded recursion in favourite reorder when all items are invalid - Removed hardcoded LCLDEBUG=True flag that spammed Kodi log on every startup - Removed stray debug print() calls in hot.py, timer.py, capture.py - Replaced all bare print() with proper xbmc.log() calls - Set legacy version flags (FRODO/GOTHAM/HELIX/ISENGARD/KRYPTON) to False - Stripped iSearch, iRecommend, Download, Copy metadata, View images, Quick launch, Now playing, and Plugin extension slots from context menu - Removed cast lookup, download, and image functions from menuUtils - Context menu now shows only: Add to Super Favourites, Addon Settings, Super Favourites Settings, Standard context menu
2.3.7 September 2023 -Fix reported glitch
2.3.6 September 2023 -Fixed root translation bug in imagecache module
2.3.5 September 2023 -Restored util module ROOT variable back to special path
2.3.4 September 2023 -Modified imagecache to ignore special paths
2.3.3 August 2023 - Added imagecache module as part of solution to implement saving icons and fanart during export/import - Modified importer module to utilize imagecache - Modified default module to utilize imagecache at startup - Fixed miscellaneous bugs related to xbmc function calls
2.3.2 July 2023 -Removed metahandler from addon.xml -Added new imagecache module to implement the ability to import/export custom icons. -Miscellaneous bug fixes -Bug fixes in imagecache module -Bug fix in importer module
2.2.6 April 2022 - Fix context menu settings bug - Fix more issues with activateWindowCommand
2.2.5 February 2022 - Generic Fix for activateWindowCommand
2.2.4 February 2022 - Fix URL Playback
2.2.3 February 2022 - Fix folder lock - Fix name colorization
2.2.1 February 2022 - Minor Bug Fix
2.2.0 December 2021 - Fixed Play From Here functionality - Fixed handling of local folders so that back button now works correctly - Added threading decorator to utils
2.1.0: 9 October 2021 - Added Spanish Translation contributed by populc - Fixed issue in player module
2.0.11: 26 August 2021 - Fixed bug in download module that prevented videos from being downloaded
2.0.10: 6 June 2021 - Fixed bug that prevented Hebrew language for working
2.0.9: 15 May 2021 - Fixed bug in Player.def activateWindowCommand(cmd) that was messing up the ability to return from child direrctories
2.0.8: 14 May 2021 - Fixed various incompatibilities with latest version of Matrix involving decode('utf-8') that caused crashes.
2.0.7: 17 February 2021 - Fixed remote folder access via another plugin
2.0.6: 11 January 2021 - Fixed access to local folders and smb folders
2.0.5: 12 December 2020 - More Fixes for Network Folder Failure to Launch
2.0.0: 29 November 2020 - Matrix Version
1.0.60: 1 November 2020 - Fixed launch issues in Kodi Leia
1.0.59: 29th May 2017 - 'Now playing' text now defined by SF due to skin variations

extension.description: A private sports addon for live events and replays. Supports NFL, golf, racing, boxing, UFC, MMA, wrestling (1700+ items). Personal use only.
extension.disclaimer: This addon is for personal use only. The developers are not responsible for any misuse.
extension.news:
v0.7.0 (2026-04-01) - STABLE RELEASE - MAJOR: Automatic stream fallback - tries all available sources until one works - User clicks once, addon automatically retries failed sources with progress notifications - LeagueDo: Full fallback support (glisco → sansat → upstor domains) - Optimized timeouts (8s per attempt) for responsive failure detection - Detailed timing logs for debugging stream issues - Cleaned UI: Removed work-in-progress features for stable release
WORKING SOURCES: ✓ Live Sports (LeagueDo) - Auto-fallback across 3 embed domains ✓ Wrestling - 1,700+ events (transparent integration) ✓ Boxing/MMA - Fights on Demand (requires Real-Debrid) ✓ NFL Replays - Full & condensed games (requires Real-Debrid) ✓ Racing/Motorsport - PitSport integration ✓ Multiple sports categories (NFL, NBA, NHL, MLB, Golf, Combat)
TECHNICAL: - Fixed critical DirectResolver fallback bug that caused 60+ second hangs - Proper resolver type detection (embed vs direct vs debrid) - JSON-encoded URL lists for multi-link streams - Backwards compatible with single-URL stream format - All embed domains: dabac, sansat, istorm, zvision, upstor, wilderness
--- Previous Development Versions ---
v0.6.30 (2026-04-01) - CRITICAL FIX: Fallback retry loop was broken - DirectResolver fallback caused Kodi to hang - Changed: Only use DirectResolver when resolver type is 'direct', not as fallback for failed embeds - Added: Detailed timing logs showing exactly how long each attempt takes - Logs now show: "Attempt 2/3 FAILED in 8.2s" or "Attempt 3/3 SUCCESS in 2.1s"
v0.6.29 (2026-04-01) - MAJOR: Automatic fallback link retry - tries all sources until one works - Shows "Trying fallback source (2/3)" notifications during retry attempts - Timeouts set to 8s (was 6s in v0.6.28) - better balance for slow embeds - Stream list simplified: one entry per channel instead of one per domain - Example: "TNT Sports 2" auto-tries glisco → sansat → upstor until success
v0.6.28 (2026-04-01) - Reduced all embed resolver timeouts for faster fallback attempts - Main/API/iframe calls: 6s (was 8/10/15s), HEAD checks: 3s (was 5s) - With multiple fallback links, faster fail-over means less wait between attempts
v0.6.27 (2026-04-01) - FIXED: LeagueDo now uses ALL available fallback links (both 'links' and 'oldLinks') - Stream names now show domain (e.g., "TNT Sports 2 [sansat]") when multiple links exist - Enables automatic fallback: glisco → sansat → upstor - Added 'upstor' to embed resolver domain support
v0.6.26 (2026-04-01) - Added dead domain blacklist (glisco.link currently offline) - Fast-fail with helpful notification instead of 15-second timeout - Reduced embed resolver timeout from 15s to 8s - NOTE: LeagueDo streams currently use glisco.link which is down
v0.6.25 (2026-04-01) - FIXED: LeagueDo parsing crash on events with null team/channel data - FIXED: Restored ResolveURL Settings to main menu (addon settings button is broken) - Properly handles JSON fields that are explicitly null vs missing
v0.6.24 (2026-04-01) - FIXED: Wrestling titles showing raw color tags ([COLOR white ]RAW[COLORsnow]) - Fixed strip_color_tags regex to handle malformed upstream XML tags - Clarified menu: "Live Events" renamed to "Live Sports (LeagueDo)" - Marked RBLive77 as WIP in menu (protobuf parsing incomplete) - Code cleanup: removed WOD branding from comments
v0.6.23 (2026-04-01) - RBLive77: Attempted protobuf parser fix (still blocked on array parsing)
v0.6.22 (2026-04-01) - RBLive77: Check for DOUBLE nesting - field 10.1.X may contain matches - Added deeper structure logging
v0.6.21 (2026-04-01) - RBLive77: Handle protobuf vs JSON format differences - Protobuf returns dict with numbered keys, not arrays
v0.6.20 (2026-04-01) - RBLive77: Parse field 10.1 as array - Collects ALL streamIds from fields 150-170
v0.6.19 (2026-04-01) - RBLive77: FIXED streamId detection - checks fields 150-153 (varies by sport)
v0.6.18 (2026-04-01) - RBLive77: FIXED crash - embedded null character in field 100 logging
v0.6.17 (2026-04-01) - RBLive77: FIXED stream fetching - extracts streamId from match field 150
v0.6.9 (2026-04-01) - Fixed protobuf parsing - added custom wire format parser
v0.6.8 (2026-04-01) - Added RBLive77 live sports integration
v0.6.7 (2026-03-31) - NEW: Racing/Motorsport section (PitSport integration)
v0.6.6 (2026-03-31) - FIXED: ResolveURL Settings menu item now works properly
v0.6.5 (2026-03-31) - FIXED: Dead link detection now works (was creating new resolver instance)
v0.6.4 (2026-03-31) - FIXED: ResolveURL settings button - IMPROVED: Dead link detection for 404 errors
v0.6.3 (2026-03-30) - Added debrid status checking with clear error messages
v0.6.2 (2026-03-30) - FIXED: NFL parsing now uses requests library
v0.6.1 (2026-03-30) - MOVED: NFL Replays now under NFL menu
v0.6.0 (2026-03-30) - NEW: NFL Replays section (full & condensed games)
v0.5.0 (2026-03-30) - BOXING/MMA SECTION: Integrated Fights on Demand content
v0.4.0 (2026-03-30) - REPLACED custom Real-Debrid with ResolveURL integration
v0.3.0 (2026-03-30) - WRESTLING SECTION: 1700+ items integrated
v0.2.0 (2026-03-29) - LeagueDo streams working - wilderness.click decryption
v0.1.0 (2026-03-29) - Initial release

extension.description: Repository for Echo-Storm's custom Kodi addons, skins, and tools
Aeon Nox: SiLVO - Echostorm Edition[CR][CR]Based on Aeon Nox by BigNoid, modded by SiLVO, widgets by Mr. V.[CR]Customized and maintained by Echo-Storm for private use.
extension.news: [I][COLOR FFFF9800]v40.0.5 - Echostorm Edition[/COLOR][/I][CR]- Packed textures for faster loading[CR]- Trimmed extras for smaller footprint[CR]- Private release

extension.description: Aeon Echostorm Edition Weather, maps, and alerts for US locations.
